name: validate_annotation
description: Validate a cluster's cell type label by comparing its top DE markers against known marker databases. Returns confidence (high/medium/low), overlap ratio, matched markers, and alternative cell type suggestions.

cluster_markers.description: Top DE genes for the cluster (from rank_genes_groups or similar).

label.description: Proposed cell type label to validate, e.g. 'NK cells'.

top_n.description: How many known markers to compare against.

returns.description: Object with label, confidence (high/medium/low), overlap_ratio, matched_markers, total_known, evidence, alternatives.
